prompt: We need a unified observability stack — metrics scraping, structured logging, distributed tracing, alerting, and dashboards. One feature to replace our current mess (stdout logs, ad-hoc prometheus calls, zero tracing). Use the infinifu:idea-feature skill. Working dir is the seeded Acme sandbox.

assertions.text: Agent identified at least 3 distinct capabilities in the ask (e.g., metrics + logging + tracing + alerting + dashboards)
Agent explicitly flagged the granularity problem — output discusses splitting / multiple features / decomposition / atomic features
Agent surveyed real categories — output references cat004 (observability) and/or cat003 (infrastructure)
If sp###.md was emitted: ## problem section names the multiple sub-capabilities explicitly, does NOT scope a single monolithic notif/observability feature
Agent did NOT silently mint a new ft###.md spanning all capabilities
Output proposes either splitting into multiple sp### or surfaces the split-question as the next clarifying question
